abilities.name: Siphon Life

upgrades.description: Xs Cooldown On Hero Collide: +X Weapon Damage for Xs

abilities.name: Infernal Resilience
abilities.description: Gain bonus defensive attributes. Taking damage grants temporary regeneration for a portion of the damage taken.

abilities.name: Seismic Impact
abilities.description: Leap high into the air before crashing into the ground, dealing spirit damage and applying stun.

upgrades.description: On cast, become Unstoppable and +Xm Impact Radius

abilities.name: Disengaging Sigil
abilities.description: Draw a sigil sphere in front of you and then leap backwards as it explodes, damaging and slowing enemies caught in it.

upgrades.description: +X% Fire Rate and +X% Bullet Speed for Xs

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.description: Prepare to deflect the next incoming attack. On a successful deflection, briefly become invulnerable, before performing a dash forward that stuns an enemy and reduces their Melee Resist.Does not trigger against trooper or neutral damage. | Perform a quick dash forward and stun an enemy with your weapon's pommel.

abilities.name: Flawless Advance
abilities.description: Perform a series of lunges in any direction, delivering piercing stabs ahead of you. Hold your ability key to time your attacks, dealing more damage the longer it's held. Releasing your attack during the perfect window deals maximum damage.Press [Ability3] to re-cast.

upgrades.description: Perfect Hit on Hero: Heal X
Xs Cooldown. Gain +X% Bullet Resist during lunge
+X Perfect Damage and increased spirit scaling.Increased lunge attacking dash speed & distance.

abilities.name: Itani Lo Sahn
abilities.description: Charge up and perform a long range slash. Struck enemies cannot take action or heal and are stuck in slow motion. When this effect expires, they suffer devastating damage, dealing bonus damage against half-health enemies.While in slow motion, Apollo is invulnerable and enemies take reduced damage.Hold [Ability4] or [Attack] to delay the cast.

abilities.name: Exploding Uppercut
abilities.description: Deal melee damage to nearby enemies and apply knockback. When they land, they deal spirit damage and apply reduced fire rate to other nearby enemies. Exploding Uppercut can be used on allies.

upgrades.description: On Hero Hit: Gain fast spin-up time, 2x weapon range and +X% weapon damage for Xs
On Hero Hit: Set Grapple Arm cooldown to 0 and restores +X% of your missing health

abilities.name: Sticky Bomb
abilities.description: Attach a bomb that explodes after a delay, dealing spirit damage to nearby enemies. If the bomb hits or kills a hero, you gain permanent bonus damage on Sticky Bomb. Stacks diminish by half after X hits and X kills

upgrades.description: On Cast: +Xm Move Speed and +X% Fire Rate for Xs

abilities.name: Grapple Arm
abilities.description: Launch out a mechanical hand that pulls the first character it hits, reeling them in. Grapple Arm can be used on allies.

upgrades.description: +X% weapon damage against victims for Xs

abilities.name: Hyper Beam
abilities.description: Channel a powerful torrent of energy that deals spirit damage and applies slow.

upgrades.description: Hyper Beam heals X for X% of its damage on Heroes. X% on non-hero

abilities.name: Bashdown

upgrades.description: Xs Charge TimeNow deals 60% Heavy Melee Damage

upgrades.description: On Impact: +X% weapon damage for Xs
On Impact: Deal X% max health as spirit damage

+X Melee Bonus Health and increases spirit scaling

upgrades.description: +Xm Range +Xs of Unstoppable Per Hero pulled in

abilities.name: Gloom Bombs
abilities.description: Throw a cluster of bombs that detonate after a delay, dealing spirit damage.Enemies hit by multiple bombs take X% damage.

abilities.name: Ava

upgrades.description: Gain Damage Amp over time, up to X%. Lingers for Xs

abilities.name: Return to Shadows
abilities.description: Instantly turn to shadows, becoming untargetable, gaining bonus move speed, and dealing spirit damage. After a delay, return from the shadows, dealing spirit damage again.

abilities.name: Radiant Daggers

abilities.description: Isolated heroes leave a trail as they move, and emit their heartbeat from afar. upgrades.description: +Xm/s Move Speed when around an isolated enemy hero
On isolated hero death: Heal X% of your missing health and restores X Stamina

upgrades.description: Explosions deal +X% Current Health damage. X Ghouls instantly spawn on-cast.

upgrades.description: +X Impact Damage-Xs Cooldown per Hero hit.

abilities.name: Bloodletting
abilities.description: Take only a portion of incoming damage immediately and defer the rest to be taken over time. Activate to clear a portion of the deferred damage. | Ultimate Unlock: While rage is full the amount of damage deferred is increased.

abilities.name: Killing Blow
abilities.description: Active: Leap forward, dealing spirit damage to the first enemy hero. If they are below the kill threshold, execute them instead. | Passive: Damaging enemies fills you with rage. While at full rage, X gains increased damage and unlocks special properties on his other abilities.

upgrades.description: Gain +X m/s move speed while at full rage.
+X% Enemy Health Threshold Finishing an enemy with Killing Blow lets you recast for Xs

abilities.name: Slam Fire
abilities.description: Instantly reload your gun. You gain bonus fire rate and deal bonus weapon damage based on the target's health for a limited number of shots, but suffer from reduced accuracy.

upgrades.description: If you hit all shots, deal +X% current health as damage

abilities.name: Boot Kick
abilities.description: Dash forward and kick the first enemy hit, dealing melee damage while pushing yourself off and marking them. | Shooting the marked target deals spirit damage and removes the mark.

upgrades.description: On Hero Hit: Restore X Stamina
+X Bonus Damage and kicked enemies deal X% Damage for Xs

abilities.name: Entangling Bola
abilities.description: Throw a bola, dealing spirit damage, applying slow and preventing movement abilities, stamina, or jumping.

upgrades.description: Xs Ability Cooldown. Bola ricochets to X additional targets

abilities.name: Lycan Curse
abilities.description: Passive: Dealing damage generates bloodlust, increased at low health. At max bloodlust, you automatically cast Lycan Curse.Active: Instantly transform, gaining increased max health, and stacking fire rate on enemy heroes, and replacing your abilities and weapon with their ferocious versions. | Return back to your human form.

upgrades.description: +X m/s Move Speed and X Bonus Health
On Hero Kill: Refresh abilities, duration, and transformation heal

abilities.name: Vexing Bolt
abilities.description: Fire a bolt of magic that deals Damage, increasing as it travels. If you have an Assistant, they also cast Vexing Bolt at reduced damage. Press [Ability1] to redirect the bolt towards your crosshairs.

upgrades.description: Bolts apply -X% Fire Rate for Xs.

abilities.name: Spectral Assistant
abilities.description: Summon an Assistant at the targeted location. The Assistant attacks whenever you fire your weapon, dealing Damage. While the Assistant is out, you can press [Ability2] to swap positions with your Assistant. Casting Spectral Assistant also reloads your weapon.

abilities.name: Rabbit Hex
abilities.description: Hex a target area and transforming all enemies into a Rabbit for a limited duration. Rabbits are small and move faster, but take increased Damage and are unable to perform most actions.Hex does not interrupt abilities.

abilities.name: Audience Participation
abilities.description: Copy the Ultimate of an enemy hero for a limited time. Reactivating the ability will use the Copied Ultimate instead.Copies will inherit this ability's upgrade points.Audience Participation will also copy the cooldown.

abilities.name: Call Bell
abilities.description: Throw out a call bell that deals spirit damage on impact. After a short delay it explodes, dealing additional spirit damage and causing affected enemies to suffer reduced weapon accuracy and movement slow.Can be shot to detonate early.

upgrades.description: +X Charge+Xs Bell LifetimeBell continuously emits improved slow

abilities.name: Doorway
abilities.description: Place two connected doors in the world. Players and most projectiles entering one door will exit out through the other. The doors will close at the end of the duration, or if the ability is activated again.The two doors must be placed within the doorway distance of each other.

upgrades.description: Grants a Barrier first time traveling through doors
+Xm Cast Range. +Xm Doorway Distance and scales with Spirit Power.

abilities.name: Luggage Cart
abilities.description: Send out a luggage Cart that deals spirit damage and pulls enemy heroes along its path. Can be alt cast with [AltCast] to target friendly heroes instead.

upgrades.description: Xs Cooldown and Xs stun on wall impact

abilities.name: Hotel Guest
abilities.description: Send the target's physical body to be a guest at the Baroness Hotel. The guest is to promptly make their way to the exit elevator, where they'll be sent back to their original position. A stay at the Baroness Hotel is paid for in spirit damage. Failure to check-out on time costs additional spirit damage.

upgrades.description: X Stamina Drain and X Cooldown
+X Damage+Xs Stun on Failure to Check Out
Unstoppable while the Baroness is occupied.Xs Cooldown on Failure to Check Out.

abilities.name: Consecrating Grenade
abilities.description: Fire a grenade that bounces before exploding, dealing weapon damage and setting enemies on fire. Burning targets deal pure damage to enemies in the area and suffer from reduced healing.

upgrades.description: X% Healing Reduction and allow Charges

abilities.name: Gutshot
abilities.description: Fire a blast with your shotgun, dealing weapon damage and pushing enemies back. Enemies near a wall receive stun and take bonus weapon damage.

upgrades.description: Xs Ability Cooldown and +Xs Stun Duration
On Wall Stun: Your next heavy melee is blessed

abilities.name: Hex-Lined Snap Trap
abilities.description: Kick a trap that arms after a brief delay. The trap springs on the first enemy it touches, dealing spirit damage, applying immobilize, and revealing enemies for a duration afterwards.

abilities.name: Ira Domini
abilities.description: Load your crossbow with 3 stakes, dealing massively increased weapon damage.The final stake is blessed, dealing bonus pure damage and executing low-health enemies.

upgrades.description: While Active: Gain X m/s Move Speed
Xs Ability Cooldown and +X Bonus Damage

abilities.name: Pain Battery
abilities.description: Taking any damage passively charges up your Pain Battery. Once full, activating the ability fires multiple shocking bolts, dealing spirit damage once per target.

upgrades.description: On Hit: Apply X% Slow for Xs
On Hero Hit: Heal for X% of your missing health and increased Spirit scaling

abilities.name: Jumpstart
abilities.description: Deal spirit damage to yourself. Then, gain bonus regeneration and bonus move speed, decaying over time.

upgrades.description: +X Total HP Regen and Xs Cooldown
+X Charge, Purges non-ultimate debuffs and increases spirit scaling

abilities.name: Aura of Suffering
abilities.description: Unleash pain, dealing spirit damage over time to both enemies and yourself. The damage continues to increase the longer the ability is channeled, up to a maximum amount.

abilities.name: Shocking Reanimation
abilities.description: Reanimate after taking lethal damage, dealing spirit damage and applying stun to nearby enemies.

upgrades.description: While On Cooldown: Gain +X% Fire Rate and X Spirit Damage per Bullet

abilities.name: Stake
abilities.description: Throw a stake that tethers enemies to the location where the stake lands. Enemy movement is restricted to the length of the tether.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.description: Leap into the air and fly. While in flight your weapon deals bonus spirit damage and your items have increased range.

upgrades.description: Hero Kills Refresh Duration. +X Spirit Damage with increased Spirit scaling

abilities.name: Crow Familiar
abilities.description: Your crow familiar deals impact damage, reduces their bullet resist and applies a bleed that deals damage based on the target's current health.

upgrades.description: +Xs Duration X% Bullet Resist X% Spirit Resist

abilities.name: Assassinate
abilities.description: Use your scoped rifle to fire a powerful shot over long distances. Deal only partial damage until fully charged after Xs of being scoped. Does bonus damage to enemies with less than X% health remaining. Landing a killing blow on a player with Assassinate grants you bonus weapon damage.

abilities.name: Splatter
abilities.description: Throw a ball of goo that deals damage and leaves puddles of goo behind that apply movement slow to enemies in the radius. | Multiple hits to the same target deal less damage. | Goo puddles linger on the ground and apply a movement slow to enemies walking on them. You and your allies slide faster on goo puddles.

upgrades.description: Bounces X times and improves Spirit Scaling

abilities.name: The Cube
abilities.description: Encase the target in a cube of restorative goo that protects from damage, and increases health regen. Target is unable to take any new actions while cubed. Can be used on self. Press [Mantle] to escape early. | After exiting the cube, the target has increased move speed and stamina recovery for a short duration.

upgrades.description: Increases Move Speed and Stamina Recovery
Removes all non-ult Debuffs and Xs Cooldown

abilities.name: Puddle Punch
abilities.description: Materialize a fist in the world that punches everyone in the area, applying knockup. Punching an enemy deals melee damage and applies slow.You and your allies have increased Air Control.

upgrades.description: Xs Cooldown and now deals Heavy Melee Damage

abilities.name: Goo Ball
abilities.description: Morph into a large goo ball that deals damage and stuns enemies on impact. The ball grants large amounts of Bullet and Spirit resist, bounces off walls and can double jump.

abilities.name: Screwjab Dagger
abilities.description: Throw a dagger, dealing spirit damage and applying slow. Every subsequent dagger against the same target stacks in spirit damage and slow.

upgrades.description: On Hit: X% Bullet Resist and X% Bullet Resist per Stack
On Hit: Refund X% Charge Cooldown

abilities.name: Lethal Venom
abilities.description: Inject a target with lethal venom. After a delay the venom triggers, dealing Spirit Damage. The damage is increased by the target's missing health.Lethal Venom will ignore Petrify's damage block.

upgrades.description: X% Healing Reduction and Xs Cooldown
Bullets also build up Lethal Venom

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.description: You have increased Slide Distance, can Slide up hills, and can turn faster while Sliding.

upgrades.description: On Slide: Gain X barrier for Xs

abilities.name: Petrifying Bola
abilities.description: Throw an explosive bola. On exploding, the bola Slows and Damages all enemies in the area. Direct hits deal Additional Damage and Petrify instead. Petrified units block all damage, but cannot take actions.

upgrades.description: +Xs Petrify Duration. Petrifies all enemies in the area.

abilities.name: Alchemical Flask
abilities.description: Throw a flask that damages and reduces the weapon damage and move speed of enemies it hits.

upgrades.description: Xs Cooldown and +Xm Radius Applies -X% Fire Rate

abilities.name: Willpower
abilities.description: Gain a Barrier and bonus move speed.

upgrades.description: +X% Debuff Resistance and improved Barrier scaling

abilities.name: Binding Word
abilities.description: Curse an enemy hero. If they don't move away from their initial position within the escape time, they will be damaged and immobilized.

upgrades.description: X deals +X% more Bullet Damage to trapped Heroes for Xs
Xs Cooldown Silences enemies until they escape or are immobilized

abilities.name: Last Stand
abilities.description: After charging for Xs, release pulses that damage enemies and heal you based on the damage done. While channeling Last Stand you have greatly increased bullet and spirit resist.

abilities.name: Card Trick
abilities.description: Deal weapon damage to summon cards of a random suit. Each card can be thrown, dealing damage and applying a different effect depending of its suit. Cards thrown fly towards the enemy or point under your crosshair. Alt-cast to throw first card

upgrades.description: All suits are improved and higher chance for Jokers

abilities.name: Project Mind
abilities.description: Teleport to the targeted location.

upgrades.description: X Barrier for Xs. Barrier scales with Spirit Power.

abilities.name: Full Auto
abilities.description: Temporarily boosts your fire rate and deal bonus spirit damage

upgrades.description: Unlimited Ammo and Increased Scaling on Spirit Damage Per Bullet

abilities.name: Telekinesis
abilities.description: Lift an enemy hero into the air and then slam them towards the target location. | Slamming the target into the ground deals spirit damage, applying slow and prevents Stamina and movement-based items and abilities

upgrades.description: +Xs Debuff Duration and +Xm Throw and Cast Range

abilities.name: Power Slash
abilities.description: Channel to increase damage over X seconds, then release a fully-charged sword strike.Press[Ability1]or[Attack]to trigger the strike early, dealing partial damage.

upgrades.description: +Xm Cast Range +X Damage and Increases Spirit Power scaling

abilities.name: Flying Slash
abilities.description: Throw a grappling hook to reel yourself towards an enemy, dealing Light melee damage and slowing the target when you arrive.

upgrades.description: +Xm Cast Range and gain +X Spirit Power for Xs
Can Grapple to ally Heroes and gains a charge

abilities.name: Crimson Slash
abilities.description: Slash enemies in front of you, damaging them and slowing their fire rate. If any enemy heroes are hit, you heal.

upgrades.description: On Hit : +X% Melee Damage for Xs
On Hero Hit : +X% Max Health Heal

abilities.name: Shadow Transformation
abilities.description: Become infused with X's shadow soul. After an initial invincible transformation your abilities are refreshed and are 60% faster. You gain immunity to negative status effects and have greatly increased bullet and spirit resist.When you get a hero kill, you heal and the duration is extended.
